'''chasoto''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:ignitibility|ignitibility]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-s-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ignitibility|ignitibility]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| chasoto
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:chæseteth|chæseteth]] || [[word:chæsetej|chæsetej]] || [[word:chæsetesh|chæsetesh]] || [[word:chæsete|chæsete]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:chasosototh|chasosototh]] || [[word:chasosotoj|chasosotoj]] || [[word:chasosotosh|chasosotosh]] || [[word:chasosoto|chasosoto]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:chasototh|chasototh]] || [[word:chasotoj|chasotoj]] || [[word:chasotosh|chasotosh]] || [[word:chasoto|chasoto]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:chasoftofth|chasoftofth]] || [[word:chasoftofj|chasoftofj]] || [[word:chasoftofsh|chasoftofsh]] || [[word:chasoftof|chasoftof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:chasototho|chasototho]] || [[word:chasotojo|chasotojo]] || [[word:chasotosho|chasotosho]] || [[word:chasotoko|chasotoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:chasototh|chasototh]] || [[word:chasotoj|chasotoj]] || [[word:chasotosh|chasotosh]] || [[word:chasoto|chasoto]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:chasotothol|chasotothol]] || [[word:chasotojol|chasotojol]] || [[word:chasotoshol|chasotoshol]] || [[word:chasotokol|chasotokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:chasotoothotho|chasotoothotho]] || [[word:chasotoojojo|chasotoojojo]] || [[word:chasotooshosho|chasotooshosho]] || [[word:chasotooko|chasotooko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:chasotothon|chasotothon]] || [[word:chasotojon|chasotojon]] || [[word:chasotoshon|chasotoshon]] || [[word:chasotokon|chasotokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:chasotothooro|chasotothooro]] || [[word:chasotojooro|chasotojooro]] || [[word:chasotoshooro|chasotoshooro]] || [[word:chasotokooro|chasotokooro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|34122d8}}
